title: Flight Potion
description: A simple mod that adds a potion of flight to the game
body:
This mod adds a balanced vanilla+ way to achieve creative flight by adding a new potion, the Potion of Flight! 

Brewed from phantom essence, an uncommon drop from phantoms, and Slow Falling Potions the Potion of Flight grants its user a nerfed version of creative flight that has a severe reduction in speed. 

Increase its potency with glowstone dust to unlock the full speed of creative flight for a shortened duration. Or perhaps lengthen its base form with redstone to allow for a more controlled flying experience.

This mod is perfect for those who want a way to fly freely but still maintain the vanilla survival feel. Avoid flying to high for your own safety!
